faq.question: What is your refund policy?
faq.answer: We offer a full refund only before installation begins. Once installation is completed, we provide a 1-year service warranty instead of a refund. For defective products before installation, we replace the product at no cost.

faq.question: What warranty do you provide?
faq.answer: All cameras and DVR recorders come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Our installation work also carries a 1-year service warranty. Extended warranty plans are available.

faq.question: How long does installation take?
faq.answer: For small setups (1-4 cameras), installation typically takes 1 working day. Larger installations (5-16 cameras) may take 2-3 days. We schedule at your convenience.

faq.question: What are your payment terms?
faq.answer: We require 50% advance payment to confirm the order. The remaining 50% is due after successful installation and testing. We accept cash, bank transfer, UPI, and all major payment methods.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We serve Bengaluru urban areas and nearby regions including Electronic City, Whitefield, Marathahalli, Koramangala, HSR Layout, Jayanagar, Rajajinagar, Yeshwanthpur, and surrounding areas. Outstation visits attract additional travel charges.

faq.question: Do you provide AMC (Annual Maintenance Contract)?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer AMC plans starting from ₹2,000 per year for small setups. AMC includes quarterly maintenance visits, priority support, and discounted repair services.

faq.question: Can I view cameras remotely?
faq.answer: Yes! All our DVR systems support remote viewing via mobile app (iDMSS/gDMSS). You can view live footage and playback recordings from anywhere with internet connectivity.

faq.question: How much does a basic home CCTV setup cost?
faq.answer: A basic 4-camera home setup (4 dome cameras + 4CH DVR + 1TB HDD + installation) typically costs between ₹22,000 to ₹25,000 including GST. Contact us for a customized quote.

policies.refund: Full refund before installation. Post-installation: 1-year service warranty applies. No cash refund after installation.
policies.warranty: 1 year on all cameras, DVRs, and installation workmanship.
policies.service_area: Bengaluru urban and nearby areas. Outstation visits: additional travel charges apply.
policies.installation_time: 1 working day for small setups (1-4 cameras). 2-3 days for larger setups.
policies.support: Call +91 98765 43210 for support. WhatsApp support available 9 AM to 7 PM, Mon-Sat.
